description: A literary genre that categorizes works based on shared narrative conventions, style, and thematic content.

name.description: The name of the genre, e.g. 科幻, 言情, 悬疑, 现实主义, 奇幻

genre_type.description: The broad category of the genre

description.description: A concise description of the genre's defining characteristics

conventions.description: Common tropes, structural elements, and stylistic conventions associated with this genre
